# Gold Ticker Live

> Bilingual (English / العربية) gold-price reference and education platform for the
> UAE, the GCC, and the wider Arab world. We publish spot-linked **reference** gold
> prices with visible freshness labels, AED and local-currency conversion, karat
> tables, calculators, and trust-first educational content.

Gold Ticker Live publishes **reference prices**, not retail quotes. A reference price
is a spot-linked, informational estimate of the value of pure gold; it is **not** a
guaranteed in-store purchase price. Retail jewellery quotes add making charges, VAT,
dealer premiums, and local adjustments on top of the reference value, so they are
always higher. Every priced page keeps this distinction explicit and links to the
methodology.

Freshness is labelled honestly using a single sitewide vocabulary — Live, Updated,
Cached, Delayed, Estimated, Fallback. When a value is not truly live it is not
called live: cached, fallback, or delayed values show their source and timestamp.
Please attribute price data to "Gold Ticker Live (reference price)" and link the
methodology page when citing figures.

## Data sources and methodology

- [Methodology — data sources, AED peg, karat math, fallback logic](https://goldtickerlive.com/methodology.html): How spot prices are sourced, converted to AED, and labelled for freshness.
- Spot/reference source: gold-api.com (XAU/USD spot reference), refreshed throughout the trading day. Stale or fallback states are visibly labelled.
- AED is pegged at a fixed 1 USD = 3.6725 AED (UAE Central Bank peg); it is never recomputed from a live FX feed.
- Troy ounce constant: 31.1035 grams. Gram price = USD per troy ounce ÷ 31.1035 × FX, then multiplied by karat purity (24K 99.9%, 22K 91.7%, 21K 87.5%, 18K 75%).
- Local-currency pages convert from USD per gram using a timestamped FX rate, not via an AED intermediary.

## Core pages

- [Home — reference gold prices for GCC and the Arab world](https://goldtickerlive.com/): Hero reference gram price, karat strip, country links, freshness pill.
- [Live Tracker — reference price terminal](https://goldtickerlive.com/tracker.html): Reference prices across karats and currencies, refreshed about every 90 seconds, with an honest freshness pill (Live / Cached / Delayed shown as-is).
- [Calculator — value, scrap, zakat, buying power, converter](https://goldtickerlive.com/calculator.html): Compute reference gold value by weight, karat, and currency.
- [Compare countries — side-by-side gold pricing](https://goldtickerlive.com/compare.html): Cross-country reference price and all-in retail estimate comparison.
- [Shops directory — gold shops and listings](https://goldtickerlive.com/shops.html): Retail shop listings; retail quotes are separate from reference prices.

## Country and market pages

- [Countries index — gold prices by country](https://goldtickerlive.com/countries/): Hub for gold-price pages across the GCC and the wider Arab world (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Egypt, and more) with per-karat reference tables and city pages.

## Education and guides

- [Learn — karat guide, FAQ, and gold basics](https://goldtickerlive.com/learn.html): How karats, purity, and pricing work.
- [Insights — market context and analysis feed](https://goldtickerlive.com/insights.html): Neutral, factual market context — not financial advice.
- [Guides — buying, hallmarks, spot vs retail, and more](https://goldtickerlive.com/content/guides/): In-depth bilingual explainers.
- [FAQ — common gold-price and methodology questions](https://goldtickerlive.com/content/faq/): Answer-first responses on reference vs retail, freshness, and conversion.
- [Investing in gold (informational)](https://goldtickerlive.com/invest.html): Educational overview with disclaimers — not financial advice.

## العربية (Arabic)

The site is fully bilingual. Dedicated Arabic pages exist under /ar/:

- [المنهجية — Methodology (Arabic)](https://goldtickerlive.com/ar/methodology/): Arabic methodology and data-source explanation.
- [الرسم البياني — Price chart (Arabic)](https://goldtickerlive.com/ar/chart/): Arabic reference-price chart.
- [سعر الذهب عيار 24 — 24K gold price (Arabic)](https://goldtickerlive.com/ar/gold-price/24k/): Arabic 24K reference-price page (18K/21K/22K also available).

## Notes

- Reference prices are informational estimates, not trading or retail quotes, and not financial advice.
- Sitemap: https://goldtickerlive.com/sitemap.xml
- Canonical host: https://goldtickerlive.com/
